name: Set of 2 24" Barrel Back Counter Stools with Metal Base & Footrest Counter Stool Gray - Room Essentials™
description:
Make your dining room or kitchen more comfortable and welcoming with these 2-Pack Barrel Back with Metal Base Counter Stool from Room Essentials™. Designed with a metal frame, these counter stools are upholstered with gray padded seats and barrel backs plus armrests to offer a comfortable spot to sit and enjoy everything from everyday dinners to parties. Plus, the four slanted legs are connected by a footrest for extra comfort and convenience.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Overall Width: 22.4 inches
Overall Height: 34.3 inches
Overall Depth: 23.6 inches
Height from seat to floor: 25 inches
